svg.title: Respiratory Muscle Memory Palace Poster
svg.desc: Mnemonic poster for respiratory muscles and innervation.
svg.text: Walk the numbers 1→15. Each character = muscle; root badge = innervation.

g.text: ant. C4–6, med. C3–8, post. C6–8

svg.text: C = cervical collar/crown; Th = Thor hammer/chestplate; L = lumber/log.
Numbers: 1 tie, 2 Noah/knee, 3 mummy, 4 rye/roar, 5 lion, 6 shoe, 7 key, 8 ivy, 9 bee, 10 saw+tie, 11 two ties, 12 tie+Noah.
Memory split: core in the center, blue inhale helpers on the left, orange/red forced-exhale squeezers on the right.

td.b: ant. C4–6, med. C3–8, post. C6–8

tr.td: huge braced arms; C5 to Thor-1 badges
upper back angel with Thor 2–5 feathers
lower back imp with Thor 9–12 tail tags
square log body; Thor-12 to lumbar-4

svg.text: Study aid only: root ranges vary by anatomy source. Verify against your lecture/AMBOSS/atlas for exams.
